summary: The conversation is about a customer inquiring about buying a tire from the Attractive Group. The customer asks about the price, offers, and services provided. The representative provides information about the tire, its price, and the offers available, including a three-year unconditional warranty and free fitting charges. The customer also inquires about a gift and the duration of the offer.

key_discussion_points.details: The customer inquired about buying a tire and asked about the price and offers available.
The representative stated that the tire would cost fourteen hundred rupees and mentioned offers such as a three-year unconditional warranty, five years of manufacturing, and free fitting charges.
The customer asked about a gift and the duration of the offer, and the representative mentioned that the gift includes earbuds but did not know the end date of the offer.
